meta.title: Extreme Visibility - Claroty S4x19 Sponsor Session
meta.description:
Patrick McBride of Claroty took the Sponsor Stage to present: Extreme Visibility for Better Threat Detection and Reduced TCO. He began with an overview on the company and its product and then presented two case studies:

10:00 OT Vulnerability and Patch Management
14:25 OT Threat Detection, Triage & Remediation
